title: Fix missing pitcher/bullpen hydration and enforce completed season-to-date coverage in MLB backfill
objective: Repair or explicitly explain the missing pitcher_game_logs and bullpen_context hydration, and ensure the season backfill only includes completed season-to-date coverage as defined in the foundation spec.
paper_only_note: This remains paper-only / observation-mode rebuild work. No model implementation or strategy change is authorized from this task.
forbidden_actions: Open daily updater work in the same task
Broad repo sweep outside the backfill path
required_work: 1. Determine why pitcher_game_logs and bullpen_context came back empty in the first-pass backfill.
2. Fix the hydration/source path if repairable within the allowed scope, or explicitly classify the exact source limitation if not.
3. Restrict the backfill to completed season-to-date coverage only, consistent with the current date and the foundation spec.
4. Rewrite affected raw/normalized partitions and manifest as needed to reflect corrected coverage.
acceptance_criteria: pitcher_game_logs is populated where source data is available, or explicit source-unavailable classification is documented in the manifest/results
bullpen_context is populated where derivable, or explicit source-unavailable classification is documented
coverage window reflects completed season-to-date only
verification: Show corrected hydration path or explicit source limitation
